title: Bulbophyllum scabratum

taxonomy: Bulbophyllum scabratum is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly referred to as the orchid family. It belongs to the genus Bulbophyllum, which is one of the largest genera of orchids. The species is further categorized within the subgenus Macrophyll, based on its distinctive characteristics and growth habits. Bulbophyllum scabratum is native to the tropical regions of Australia and Southeast Asia, where it thrives in humid environments. The exact classification may vary depending on the source and the most recent taxonomic updates.
